name: claude-log-compressor
description: MCP server that intercepts build/test/install commands, runs them, and returns a compressed summary to Claude — dramatically reducing context consumption during iterative build/test loops.
author: dongnh <hoaidongit5@gmail.com>

scripts.postbuild: node -e "import('node:fs').then(fs => { const p='dist/index.js'; const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); if(!s.startsWith('#!')) fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+s); fs.chmodSync(p,0o755); })"
